methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Iran faces escalating Israeli strikes on energy and nuclear sites amid internal repression
bullets: Israel struck Iran's largest petrochemical facility and a gas field near a nuclear power plant, prompting IAEA warnings.
Iranian authorities executed a protester and targeted a top university as the healthcare system collapses under war pressure.
Syria moved to regulate protests following anti-UAE demonstrations while 80% of the population remains food insecure.
regional_summary_6h.watch: Monitor potential spillover from Iranian energy infrastructure attacks on regional stability.
